headline: How Honeywell Technologies’ (HON) Post-Spin Structure Creates a Cleaner Automation Thesis
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is one of the best industrial automation stocks to buy now. On June 29, Honeywell Technologies launched as an independent public company after the completion of the Honeywell Aerospace spin-off, with the stock continuing to trade on Nasdaq under the HON ticker. The company framed the new entity as a pure-play […]
